description: You are a building energy manager commissioning a net metering monitoring system at http://localhost (admin/admin). Configure the 'smartmeter' node inputs to create a monitoring pipeline. Apply a 1.15 calibration multiplier to 'import_w' and log the result to a 'Grid Import Power' feed and a 'Grid Import Energy kWh' accumulation feed. Log 'export_w' to a 'Grid Export Power' feed and a 'Grid Export Energy kWh' accumulation feed. Create a dashboard named 'Grid Energy Monitor' with at least four widgets displaying import power, export power, import energy, and export energy.
